title: Spicy Stir Fry
description: A spicy and savory stir fry dish that combines the flavors of Korean chili flakes with the crunch of crispy elements.

ingredients.name: Crispy elements
ingredients.notes: Choose crispy elements such as kimchi or fried shallots

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the sliced carrots and cook for 3-4 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the chopped crispy elements, Korean chili flakes, soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, and black pepper to the skillet.
Stir-fry the mixture for 2-3 minutes, until the carrots are tender and the flavors are combined.
Serve the stir-fry hot, garnished with additional crispy elements if desired.
